---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

[Download My CV (PDF)] (tugcebasaran_cv.pdf)

# Education

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2021 - ongoing.

# Work Experience

## Employements

1.  Firm ROKETSAN, position Candidate Engineer, year 2025

## Internships

1.  Firm Corendon Airlines, position Intern, year 2024

2.  Firm ROKETSAN, position ıntern, year 2025

# Projects

Graduation Project - Air Vehicle Design and Development Project Scheduling with Uncertain Activity Durations- TUSAŞ

# Competencies

R, Quarto, Git, Python, Excel, Minitab, Matlab, Microsoft Project

# Hobbies

Puzzle
